title: The Words That Cannot Be Stopped
description: On pages 1–1, the words that cannot be stopped focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
scene: On pages 1–1, the words that cannot be stopped focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
summary: This part closes East Blue with a storm-driven escape and the crew’s first real step toward the Grand Line.
